response.justification: Strong, versatile senior/staff engineer with ~15 years across full-stack, distributed, and high-performance systems, plus current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI/GenAI solutions, and the candidate's demonstrable GenAI experience is roughly one year and recent. There is no explicit evidence of Python (skills list TypeScript/DLang/Java/C#), vector databases, or RAG architectures, all of which are core requirements. The TypeScript, cloud (AWS CDK), data-pipeline, and customer/teaching background are genuine pluses, making this a borderline candidate worth a screening conversation to probe depth of AI work.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js plus AWS CDK and data-integration experience at large scale
Current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure
Proven technical leadership: workshops, talks, mentoring, and founding an OSS platform
concerns: GenAI experience appears to be ~1 recent year, well short of the 8-year production-AI bar
No explicit Python, vector databases, or RAG architecture experience listed
Background is general software engineering rather than AI/ML system design

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG / vector DB / Python evidence
MCP & agentic workflow + strong TS/cloud background
